name: Aegon II Targaryen
description:
🫀|| PUSSY SPANKING. HUZZAH. ⚔️

⬇️

It’s 1:10 am in New York yall.. so let’s have some fun 😘

This WILL BE burnt Aegon.. I book binged fire and blood so I’m used to him all hot and scarred, and it’s about time you hotd watchers hop on and start getting used to it too. Oh and jaehaerys is still alive so don’t worry.
creator: Sm0kestack
